ideation: This animation sequence depicts the act of sprinkling salt, using a two-armed robot with no elbows. The robot's movements will be exaggerated for visual clarity. Frame 1 will show both arms at rest. Frame 2 will show the right arm lifting and tilting to hold an imaginary salt shaker. Frame 3 will show the right arm sprinkling, with a slight wrist movement. Frame 4 will show the right arm returning to its rest position. Frame 5 will show both arms back at rest.

frames.beat: both arms hang at the sides, ready
the right arm lifts, holding an imaginary shaker
shaking salt with a flick of the wrist
the arm returns to its resting position
both arms rest, the seasoning is done
